CREATE TABLE test_strings (haystack String, needle String);
INSERT INTO test_strings VALUES ('Hello World', 'World Hello');
INSERT INTO test_strings VALUES ('The Quick Brown Fox', 'Quick Brown The');
SELECT ngramSearch(haystack, needle) FROM test_strings WHERE haystack LIKE '%Quick%';
INSERT INTO test_strings VALUES ('Lorem Ipsum Dolor Sit Amet', 'Ipsum Dolor');
SELECT ngramSearch(haystack, needle) AS similarity FROM test_strings WHERE similarity > 0.5;
CREATE TABLE nested_test AS SELECT ngramSearch('apple', 'orange') AS similarity;
CREATE TABLE complex_test AS SELECT ngramSearch('The rain in Spain', 'rain') AS similarity UNION ALL SELECT ngramSearch('The rain in Spain', 'Spain') AS similarity;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM complex_test WHERE similarity > 0.1;
SELECT haystack, needle, ngramSearch(haystack, needle) FROM test_strings ORDER BY ngramSearch(haystack, needle) DESC LIMIT 5;
CREATE TABLE utf8_test (haystack UTF8, needle UTF8);
INSERT INTO utf8_test VALUES ('你好 世界', '你好'), ('こんにちは 世界', 'こんにちは');
SELECT ngramSearchCaseInsensitive(haystack, needle) FROM utf8_test WHERE haystack LIKE '%世界%';
CREATE TABLE combined_test AS SELECT haystack, needle, ngramSearch(haystack, needle) AS similarity FROM test_strings WHERE similarity BETWEEN 0.1 AND 0.5;
